title: 6Pcs Precut Faux Fur Square, 25x25cm Assorted Colours Fluffy Fur Patches, Decorative Sewing Craft Fur Cuts, Shaggy Fake Plush Fabric, Artificial Fur Fabric for Christmas Gnome Costume

【Personalized Gifts】This craft fur cuts is an excellent choice for crafting personalized gifts for family and colleagues during festive occasions such as christmas and easter. This shaggy fake plush fabric adds a thoughtful touch to your presents that everyone will appreciate.
